title: Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences
content:
Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences

KOSGEB - Entrepreneurship Course

MENU

Okan University, within the scope of the cooperation protocol with KOSGEB (Small and Medium Enterprises Development Organization of Turkey ) since 2011, offers to our students who take the 42-hour entrepreneurship course and want to establish their own business a total of 56 hour

Advanced

Entrepreneurship

education that allows them to increase the knowledge and skills necessary to establish and manage business, understand their responsibilities in this process, and prepare a business plan for their business ideas. All students successfully completing Advanced Entrepreneurship course aiming at enriching the entrepreneurship culture in our country and establishing businesses with sustainable success, can get Okan University and KOSGEB approved Entrepreneurship

Certificate

. With this certificate, our students are entitled to apply a support up to 150 thousand Turkish Lira from KOSGEB. Our students will have the opportunity to benefit from 50 thousand Turkish Lira as a donation and 100 thousand Turkish Lira as a medium term and low interest credit, if the projects they have developed are approved by KOSGEB.Students will have the opportunity to benefit from the donations of 50 thousand Turkish Liras for the grant and 100 thousand TL for the medium term and low interest loans if the projects they have developed are approved by KOSGEB.
